name: Omid Drug Rehabilitation Center, Kabul
detail: Pakistani F-16 strike on March 16, 2026 targeting the Omid center in Kabul's Khair Khana district. Pakistan claimed the facility harbored TTP militants; Afghan and UN investigators found no evidence. Revised toll: 411 killed, 263 injured — mostly patients. HRW declared the strike unlawful.

name: Sarkano and Narai Districts, Kunar Province
detail: Pakistan fired 85 artillery shells into Kunar province on March 25, 2026, following expiry of the Eid ceasefire. Targets included Sarkano (47 shells + 2 drone strikes), Narai, Manura (2 shells), Shultan (15 shells), and Asadabad surroundings (5 shells). 2 civilians killed, 8 wounded.

name: TTP Positions — Paktika, Khost, Nangarhar Provinces
detail: Operation Ghazab-il-Haq targeting of alleged TTP and militant infrastructure across Paktika, Khost, and Nangarhar provinces following resumption of operations on March 26, 2026. Pakistan claims 62 locations struck since February 26, 237 outposts destroyed. Casualty figures disputed.
